user_prompt: Critical: Land Speeder requires a diagnostics
prayer:
Approach the Land Speeder with reverence, mechadendrites humming the Canticle of Inspection.
Initiate diagnostics upon its gravitic engines, beseeching the Machine Spirit to unveil hidden corruptions.
Anoint the auspex cogitators of the Land Speeder with sacred oils whilst intoning binary litanies.
Verify the Land Speeder's sanctity through auspex sweeps, invoking the Omnissiah's unerring gaze.

user_prompt: My Skorpius Dunerider is ready for consecration
prayer:
Gather before the Skorpius Dunerider, its dune-skimming hull gleaming under forge-lights.
Commence consecration rites upon the Skorpius Dunerider, sanctifying treads and lascannon housings alike.
Invoke the Machine Spirits within, anointing with blessed promethium as prayers echo in binaric.
Seal the consecration with the Sigil of the Omnissiah, binding the Skorpius Dunerider to His divine will.

user_prompt: Bless the long las for targeting
prayer:
Kneel before the long las, its barrel a conduit of the Omnissiah's wrath.
Invoke targeting auspex calibrations upon the long las, awakening its predatory Machine Spirit.
Anoint the sighting cogitators of the long las with unguents of precision.
Beseech the Omnissiah for unerring aim, as targeting matrices align in holy symphony.

prayer:

Commune with its Machine Spirit, affirming full charge in the Machine God's name.

prayer:

Verify startup integrity through auspex communion, praising the Omnissiah's indomitable forge.

user_prompt: The life sustainer requires a cooling

Monitor thermal auspex as the life sustainer stabilises, intoning hymns of equilibrium.

user_prompt: Can you guide Archaeopter Stratoraptor a preparation?
prayer:

Begin preparation rituals for the Archaeopter Stratoraptor, sanctifying fusial reactors.
Invoke the Machine Spirits of flight, anointing control vanes with aeriform blessed.
Finalise preparation with binaric oaths, binding the Archaeopter Stratoraptor to the Omnissiah's sky.

user_prompt: Bless the conversion beamer for blessing
prayer:
Revere the conversion beamer, annihilator of flesh through sub-atomic grace.
Bestow blessing upon the conversion beamer, awakening its disruptive Machine Spirit.
Anoint focusing crystals of the conversion beamer twice with rad-philtres.
Seal the blessing in the Omnissiah's name, as energy matrices hum with holy power.

Seize the bolt pistol in ritual grip, its muzzle hot from righteous expulsion.
Initiate cooling ceremonies upon the bolt pistol, beseeching its Machine Spirit's calm.
Anoint barrel vents of the bolt pistol with ablative sacraments from cryo-vaults.
Affirm thermal quiescence through vox-diagnostics, glorifying the Omnissiah's temperance.

Bow to the macro-cannon, thunderous voice of the Machine God's judgement.
Commence consecration upon the macro-cannon, sanctifying its vast breeches and loaders.
Invoke awakening of the macro-cannon's Machine Spirits with thunderous litanies.
Seal the rite by anointing recoil absorbers, dedicating the macro-cannon eternally to the Omnissiah.
